falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 78% bottom pattern match, proving this is not a repeat of that structural low and the macro engine's pattern recognition failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 implies contained volatility; sustained VIX above 35 indicates genuine panic rather than the measured capitulation the pattern requires, breaking the bottom formation logic

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while S&P 500 is simultaneously down more than 2% week-over-week
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety recession panic rather than the disinflationary soft-landing bottom the August 2024 pattern represents, invalidating the macro regime classification

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
